args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness >/dev/null
grep -q '"name":"prefill_attention"' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"
grep -q '"scope":"prefill_attention"' "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json"
if grep -q 'decode_attention' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"; then
  echo 'unexpected decode scope in scoped buildplan' >&2
  exit 1
fi
if grep -q 'decode_attention' "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json"; then
  echo 'unexpected decode scope in materialization report' >&2
  exit 1
fi
printf 'scoped-build\n'
